creator: dettus@dettus.net
text:
It looks like I have forgotten something in the Makefile: 
I recently decided to release my projects as .tar.bz2, as opposed to .tar.gz.

And I was under the assumption that changing the filename in the pkg-descr was enough. Apparently, it was not!

Please, kind Sir, help me out: What do I have to put into the Makefile, to make it download 

https://www.dettus.net/dMagnetic/dMagnetic_0.19.tar.bz2

?
